detect.predict.instructions: Analyze the supplied passage and determine whether it was more likely generated by an AI or written by a human. Base the judgment only on evidence in the text, such as formulaic structure, repetition, unnatural phrasing, generic or overly polished language, inconsistencies, and signs of personal specificity. Treat these as probabilistic signals rather than definitive proof. Return a single classification—`AI-generated` or `Human-written`—followed by a brief explanation citing the strongest textual clues. Do not claim certainty or rely on external detection tools.
detect.predict.signature:
StringSignature(text -> reasoning, is_ai
    instructions='Analyze the supplied passage and determine whether it was more likely generated by an AI or written by a human. Base the judgment only on evidence in the text, such as formulaic structure, repetition, unnatural phrasing, generic or overly polished language, inconsistencies, and signs of personal specificity. Treat these as probabilistic signals rather than definitive proof. Return a single classification—`AI-generated` or `Human-written`—followed by a brief explanation citing the strongest textual clues. Do not claim certainty or rely on external detection tools.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'desc': 'Passage to classify', '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:'})
    reasoning = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'desc': '${reasoning}', '__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Reasoning:'})
    is_ai = Field(annotation=bool required=True json_schema_extra={'desc': 'True for AI-generated text; otherwise False', '__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Classification:'})
)

fields.name: is_ai
fields.description: True for AI-generated text; otherwise False
